title: 3Ysr1A8R7V0Kfa3H63Y1Z42Avvm8Wk
summary:
Main
The latest data from the China Iron and Steel Association (CISA) shows that daily crude steel production at large and medium-sized mills averaged a record 2.14 million tons during June 11 - June 20. This is 1% more than was produced during the previous ten days and is 3% more than was produced during the same period last year. Chinese steel production set a record last month and has continued to set new records this month.
